text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
At the year-end Grand Prix—the Arima
Kinen—standing at the top of all these<n>amazing
classic and senior racers is...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin! She's seized victory<n>with her
unprecedentedly powerful<n>final sprint!

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Dear... Look at how strong you are.<n>Look how
strong you've become!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket hoists Narita Taishin<n>atop her
shoulders—with Biwa<n>Hayahide lending a steady
hand on<n>her back to keep her from falling.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With her head held higher than<n>anyone else's,
Narita Taishin basks<n>in the thunderous applause
and<n>booming cheers that never seem to<n>end.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: You were the fastest of them all!
